title: pilosella densiflora subsp. manothyrsa
intro: Pilosella densiflora subsp. manothyrsa is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Pilosella densiflora plant, belonging to the dandelion family Asteraceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella densiflora subsp. manothyrsa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
